title: Vanilla Steamed Beef Stir-fry
description: A unique Ukrainian dish featuring tender steamed beef with a hint of vanilla extract, perfect for weeknight dinners and high-protein-friendly meals.

ingredients.name: beef sirloin
ingredients.notes: preferably lean meat for tenderness and health benefits

instructions: Combine soy sauce, ginger, garlic, pepper flakes, sesame oil, brown sugar, lime juice, and water chestnuts in a bowl. Add the steak pieces evenly to the mixture, making sure they are well coated.
Heat a large pan with vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Once hot, pour the marinade into the pan and mix thoroughly until all ingredients are combined well.

Pour the mixed sauce onto a steamer basket or a regular pot with water for steaming. Place the steak pieces on top of the liquid mixture evenly. Cover and steam for about 15-20 minutes or until the meat reaches an internal temperature of at least 63°C (145°F).
Once cooked, remove from heat and let it rest for a few minutes before serving.
